policy: Curated promotion manifest for full_site pages that have been upgraded from bilingual_draft to bilingual_complete after paragraph-level bilingual coverage and draft-marker removal.

promotions.reason: Core Hd Hydra Framework module entry upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for communication between multiple scene graphs and multiple renderers, HdRenderIndex, HdSceneDelegate, scene index, Rprim/Sprim/Bprim object categories, HdTask execution units, buffer source/data source/locator data flow, dirty bits and locator invalidation change processing, render delegate capability boundaries, AOV/render buffer/selection/picking workflows, boundaries with UsdImaging, HdSt, Hdx and Hgi, and practical debugging paths that separate authored scene data, Hydra synchronization, task execution, renderer delegate consumption and backend execution.

Core Arch Architecture Dependent module entry upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for architecture-dependent code, platform dependency isolation, concentrating confusing #ifdefs into a small library, multi-platform documentation responsibilities, Bits, Multithreading, Math, Strings, System Functions, Memory Management, Diagnostics and Symbol Visibility group boundaries, OS and CPU tokens such as ARCH_OS_LINUX, ARCH_OS_DARWIN, ARCH_OS_WINDOWS and ARCH_CPU_INTEL, relationships with Tf, Plug, build systems and shared-library loading, and debugging workflows that separate platform-specific failures from higher-level Sdf, Pcp, Usd, Hydra, renderer or schema semantics.

Core Ar Asset Resolution module entry upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for querying, reading and writing asset data, decoupling authored asset identifiers from physical storage, filesystem and custom resolver implementations, ArResolver as the central abstraction, ArGetResolver, AR_DEFINE_RESOLVER and PlugRegistry registration, Primary Resolver versus URI and IRI Resolver responsibilities, authored asset path versus resolved path, resolver context and ArResolverContextBinder effects on UsdStage and layer loading, ArResolverScopedCache and ArThreadLocalScopedCache lifetime boundaries, ArAsset data access responsibilities, package-relative paths, and debugging workflows that separate plugin loading, context mismatch, cache pollution, permissions, package paths, URI scheme, SdfLayer reading and composition behavior.

Core Tf container template page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for TfDenseHashMap as a space-efficient map-like utility container that mimics TfHashMap API and uses vector storage for small maps, template parameters Key, Data, HashFn, EqualKey and Threshold, hash/equality consistency, Threshold as a storage strategy boundary rather than capacity, typedefs key_type, mapped_type, value_type, iterator, const_iterator and insert_result, constructor overload families, begin and end traversal semantics, lookup APIs find, count, operator[], empty and size, mutation APIs insert, erase and clear, boundaries with authored USD composition and schema data, performance diagnosis around element-count distribution, hash cost and deterministic ordering, and debugging workflows for unexpected insertion, iterator invalidation, threshold behavior and synchronization.

Core Gf Basic Geometry ray page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for GfRay as a three-dimensional ray value type used for intersection testing, origin and start point semantics, direction vector storage without default unit-length normalization, distance parameter interpretation, zero-distance start point intersections, GfRay constructors, SetPointAndDirection, SetEnds, GetStartPoint, GetDirection, GetPoint, Intersect overloads for geometry inputs such as GfPlane, GfRange3d and GfBBox3d, FindClosestPoint and GfFindClosestPoints closest-point workflows, Transform behavior with GfMatrix4d that separates point translation from vector direction, equality versus geometric equivalence, related GfVec3d, GfLine and GfLineSeg boundaries, and debugging workflows for coordinate space, unit direction, ray versus line segment semantics, distance clipping and non-uniform transformed directions.

Core Gf Basic Geometry one-dimensional range page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for GfRange1d as a double precision interval value type, min max endpoint semantics, empty range convention max less than min, default empty range [FLT_MAX,-FLT_MAX], ScalarType and MinMaxType roles, constructor endpoint-order behavior, GetMin, GetMax, GetMidpoint, GetSize, Contains, ExtendBy, GetUnion, GetIntersection, Intersection, GetDistanceSquared, component-wise interval mathematics, precision boundary with GfRange1f, deprecated API migration, accumulation patterns for time intervals, parameter domains, scalar bounds, animation sample ranges, and debugging workflows that separate empty state, endpoint units, zero-size intersections, coordinate space, precision conversion, USD authored data, and renderer or composition symptoms.

Core Gf Linear Algebra dual-quaternion page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for GfDualQuatf as a float precision value type made from a real part quaternion and a dual part quaternion, its role in representing rotation plus translation, ScalarType precision boundaries with GfDualQuatd and GfDualQuath, constructor overload semantics, GetReal, GetDual, GetTranslation, GetLength, Normalize, GetNormalized, GetInverse, GetConjugate, GetIdentity, GetZero, value-type operators, relationships with GfQuatf, GfVec3f, GfMatrix4f, GF_MIN_VECTOR_LENGTH, rigid transform interpolation and skinning workflows, and debugging paths that separate normalization, real dual part interpretation, multiplication order, extracted translation, USD authored xform ops, and runtime transform behavior.

Core UsdSchemaRegistry page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for the singleton registry of registered USD IsA schema and applied API schema type information, generated schema data, prim definitions, SchemaInfo, VersionPolicy, schema family and version lookup, concrete abstract and applied API prim-definition queries, BuildComposedPrimDefinition composition, API schema type-name mapping, allowed target type names, auto-apply plugin rules, TokenToTokenVectorMap and TfToken exact-name semantics, boundaries with UsdPrimDefinition, UsdSchemaBase, UsdTyped, UsdAPISchemaBase, UsdPrim, UsdAttribute, generatedSchema.usda, fallback prim types, authored opinions, stage composition, plugin registration, generated schema files, and debugging workflows that separate registry metadata, prim definitions, API schema application, composed scene data, and runtime consumer behavior.

Core UsdVol particle-field spherical-harmonics attribute API page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for UsdVolParticleFieldSphericalHarmonicsAttributeAPI as an applied API schema that defines per-particle radiance through spherical harmonics attributes, boundaries with ParticleField data, UsdVolParticleFieldRadianceBaseAPI, UsdAPISchemaBase, UsdPrim, UsdAttribute, UsdSchemaRegistry, renderer support, and typed prim authoring, method semantics for Apply, CanApply, Get, GetSchemaAttributeNames, Create/GetRadianceSphericalHarmonicsDegreeAttr, Create/GetRadianceSphericalHarmonicsCoefficientsAttr, and Create/GetRadianceSphericalHarmonicsCoefficientshAttr, field-wide SH degree semantics, float versus half coefficient precedence, coefficient array length constraints derived from particle count and degree, composition risks when degree and coefficients are overridden separately, and debugging workflows that separate API application, schema attribute names, authored values, array layout, precision choice, composed values, and downstream particle-field or renderer consumption.
